Variable.name: appName
Variable.Description: The name of the AD application/source in IIQ (e.g. "Active Directory").

Variable.name: groupName
Variable.Description: The name of the new AD group to create (e.g. "GRP_MyTeam").

Variable.name: groupBaseDN
Variable.Description: The base DN / OU where the group will be created (e.g. "OU=Groups,DC=corp,DC=example,DC=com").

Variable.name: groupDescription
Variable.Description: A human-readable description for the new AD group.

Variable.name: fisResourceOwners
Variable.Description: Comma-separated list of FIS resource owner usernames or identifiers to set as owners.

Variable.name: plan
Variable.Description: The ProvisioningPlan built to create the AD group.

Variable.name: provisioningErrors
Variable.Description: Any provisioning errors encountered; surfaced back to the API caller.

Variable.name: workItemStatus
Variable.Description: Final status of the workflow: Success | Failed | Pending.

Variable.name: launcher
Variable.Description: Identity of the workflow initiator â populated automatically from the API call context.

Step.name: Validate Inputs
Step.Description: Verify required inputs are present and the application exists in IIQ.

Step.name: Build Provisioning Plan
Step.Description: Construct the ProvisioningPlan that creates the AD group object.

Step.name: Compile Project
Step.Description: Compile the ProvisioningPlan into a ProvisioningProject.

Step.name: Provision AD Group
Step.Description: Execute the ProvisioningProject to create the AD group.

Step.name: Handle Error
Step.Description: Log errors and set the output status before ending.
